title: ‘Don't Blame Me’: Mamata Sheds Responsibility For Murshidabad Violence on Ram Navami, Flags ‘Officers Transferred’ Conspiracy
description: West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee strongly denied any responsibility on the part of her administration for the violence. She alleged that recent transfers of officers were a deliberate attempt to instigate riots and blamed “BJP’s people” for the unrest.
